svg.text: Call Center AI Transformation Blueprint, 12-Month Operating Model
VW · Audi · Skoda · SEAT · Porsche · Bentley · Lamborghini | 400+ dealers, ~3M active customers, 24/7 service line
Phase 1 PoC: Service Appointment Agent · 60-day pilot
Where customers reach us, where we reach customers
10 specialized voice agents grouped by intent. Each owns a use case end-to-end.
Layered view from telephony to analytics. Freya owns voice + LLM + workflow; Doğuş owns CRM + DMS.
Freya state machine · per-agent flows · API-call nodes
Service catalog · Parts catalog · Recall list · Pricing API
SAP CRM · DOD app · Dealer DMS (heterogeneous)
Langfuse traces · Datadog · QA sample reviews · WER/CER monitoring
KVKK consent capture · voice biometrics · 90-day retention · SOC2
From single-agent PoC to multi-brand premium scale, gated by KPIs.
What success looks like at month 12. Measured weekly, reported monthly.
Who decides what, on what cadence. Aligned with dealer network reality.
✓ Service Appointment Agent in 1 brand × 3 dealers
✓ Outbound NPS callback for last week's services
✓ Recall campaign call-out for one open campaign
✓ Daily Slack digest of failed/escalated calls
What can break, and how we de-risk
→ Standardize 3 most common, manual fallback for rest
→ Legal opinion in week 1, opt-in flow on call
→ Continuous batching + autoscale + queue with ETA
→ Champion dealer council + pilot wins as proof
→ Audit trail per call, weekly OEM reporting
Prepared by Freya Labs · Confidential, for Doğuş Otomotiv leadership review · Print at A0 (84cm × 119cm) for war-room wall
